title: Merge Sort - Data Structures & Algorithms Tutorial Python #17
description:
Merge sort is a sorting algorithm that gives time complexity of O(nlogn) and thus performs better than insertion sort, bubble sort etc. In this data structures and algorithm video in python, we will go over how exactly merge sort works, implement merge sort in python and at the end there will be an exercise for you for practice.

Code: https://github.com/codebasics/data-structures-algorithms-python/blob/master/algorithms/5_MergeSort/merge_sort_final.py
Exercise: https://github.com/codebasics/data-structures-algorithms-python/blob/master/algorithms/5_MergeSort/merge_sort_exercise.md
Data structures and algo in python playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLeo1K3hjS3uu_n_a__MI_KktGTLYopZ12
